CREATE TABLE numbers (a FLOAT, b FLOAT);
SELECT multiply(m.a, m.b) AS product, mu.x FROM numbers m JOIN multipliers mu ON mu.x > m.a;
SELECT (SELECT multiply(a, 2) FROM numbers WHERE b < 5) AS double_value;
CREATE TABLE factors (factor1 FLOAT, factor2 FLOAT);
SELECT multiply(f.factor1, (SELECT AVG(factor2) FROM factors)) FROM factors f;
SELECT multiply(SELECT AVG(a) FROM numbers, (SELECT MAX(b) FROM numbers));
CREATE TABLE complex_calc (val1 FLOAT, val2 FLOAT, val3 FLOAT);
SELECT multiply(val1, (SELECT MAX(val2) FROM complex_calc)) FROM complex_calc WHERE val3 > 5;
